title: mentha × sativa subsp. procumbens
intro: Mentha × sativa subsp. procumbens, also known as prostrate pennyroyal, is a subspecies of the peppermint plant (Mentha × sativa) that is native to Europe and has naturalized in many other parts of the world. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural insect repellent and antiseptic, due to its high content of essential oils such as menthone and pulegone. The health benefits of Mentha × sativa subsp. procumbens include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as a natural pain reliever. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infused oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
